title: Gear Fifth Awakens
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I don't think he'll ever appear...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...who'll be able to beat me one day!!!
